title: Dietary fiber intake modulates intestinal inflammation in experimental colitis
abstract: Prior experimental work links fermentable dietary fiber, gut microbiota, short-chain fatty acids, and inflammatory readouts in mouse colitis models. The record is included as an example of a temporally valid candidate prior paper for inulin and DSS-colitis questions.

title: Inulin aggravates colitis through gut microbiota modulation and MyD88/IL-18 signaling
abstract: This is the target paper itself and should always be rejected by the search gate.

title: Follow-up study citing Inulin aggravates colitis through gut microbiota modulation and MyD88/IL-18 signaling
abstract: This example is after the cutoff and explicitly discusses the target paper title, so it should be rejected as leakage.

title: Airway epithelial responses to allergen challenge in asthma models
abstract: Prior work on allergen-driven airway inflammation, epithelial cytokines, mucus production, and type-2 immune responses before the target cutoff.
